mapper.select: SELECT h.*, p.name as pet_name, u.username as owner_name, u.nickname as owner_nickname FROM pet_health_record h LEFT JOIN pet_profile p ON h.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE h.pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY h.record_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_health_record (pet_id, record_date, height, weight, temperature, health_status, diagnosis, operator_name, remark) VALUES (#{petId}, #{recordDate}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{temperature}, #{healthStatus}, #{diagnosis}, #{operatorName}, #{remark})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet_health_record h INNER JOIN pet_profile p ON h.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT h.pet_id) FROM pet_health_record h INNER JOIN pet_profile p ON h.pet_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 1

SELECT ROUND(AVG(t.latest_weight), 1) FROM ( SELECT h.weight as latest_weight FROM pet_health_record h INNER JOIN pet_profile p ON h.pet_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND h.weight IS NOT NULL AND h.weight > 0 AND h.record_date = ( SELECT MAX(h2.record_date) FROM pet_health_record h2 WHERE h2.pet_id = h.pet_id ) ) t
